title: coluteastrum lanatum
intro: Coluteastrum lanatum, also known as bladderpod, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, helping to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Coluteastrum lanatum include its ability to support kidney function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Coluteastrum lanatum is often used as a decoction or tincture, and can be found in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
